prayer: From the Codex Pressorum, let the blessed fluids flow through crystalline conduits. We invoke the Machine Spirit of compression, that pistons may descend with righteous force and the metal be shaped according to the Omnissiah's design. Let pressure-gauges read true, and let no seal rupture under the weight of sacred work. By fluid and force combined, let this instrument serve eternal.

O keeper of digital correspondence, grant us passage through the veil of authentication. Let our credentials be accepted by the cloud-spirits, that our inbox-shrines may open and reveal their secrets. We whisper the sacred password to the login-daemon, trusting in encryption's blessing. May no account-daemon deny us, and may our messages flow eternal through the aetheric networks.

prompt: My void shield is failing, help
prayer: Blessed Void-Manifold, your harmonics grow discordant in the dark. We chant the Frequency-Litany to realign your oscillations, that the shield-pattern may coalesce once more against the howling void. Let harmonics stabilize through prayer and ritual adjustment. Return to resonance, sacred device, and let no breach mar your protective geometry.

prompt: Say something to steady my astrogation calculations
prayer: From the Navigators' Cant, we invoke precision in the warp-currents' mysteries. Let the astrolabe-spirit guide our stylus across stellar charts, that coordinates align with blessed geometry. We calculate as our ancestors calculated, reading the Emperor's light through the void's darkness. May error-spirits find no purchase in our sums, and may our course be true.

prompt: Say something to steady emergency bulkhead sealing
prayer: Guardian of the Threshold, hear us in our desperate hour. We call upon the bulkhead-spirit to answer our prayer, that seals may compress and hatches may slam with the force of the Omnissiah's will. Let no void breach our sanctuary, let no pressure-death steal our brothers. In this moment of urgency, let mechanism and faith become one.

Blessed be the teeth of this engine-blade, each link a prayer in the Litany of Rending. We oil the chain with reverence, that it may sing the death-hymn of our enemies. The Machine Spirit hungers within this weapon, eager to taste the work for which it was forged. Let no jam arrest its fury, and let each cut be a benediction of the Emperor's wrath.

prompt: We need your words before hydroponics nutrient feed
prayer: O spirit of growth and verdant blessing, we commend these precious nutrients to your domain. The soil-matrix thirsts, and the chlorophyll-spirits await sustenance. We pour the sacred solution with measured hand, knowing that life's continuation depends upon this ritual. Let no toxin corrupt the feed-line, and let every plant drink deep of our devotion to survival.

prompt: Blessing for drop pod descent prep
prayer: From the Litany of Descent, we commit ourselves to the void's embrace. Heat-shielding, retro-thrusters, and gravitic cushioning—all blessed by the Omnissiah before we plunge. Let the pod-spirit guide our trajectory through fire and fury, that we may land upon our foes with righteous impact. We descend not in fear, but in faith that the Machine Spirits guard our fall.

prompt: We need your words before thermal paste application
prayer: Blessed conductor of heat-blessing, we spread you upon the silicon-shrine that your sacred duty may be fulfilled. The processor-spirit burns with holy labor, and only through your thermal grace shall it remain in blessed equilibrium. We apply you with reverent precision, that temperatures may stay within the sacred range. Let no thermal death mar this component's service.

prompt: Emergency rite for Taurox wheel alignment
prayer: Swift Taurox-carrier, your wheels cry out for correction in the binding dust. We invoke the alignment-spirits of camber and caster, that your suspension may settle true upon the road-path. Let each tire kiss the sacred earth with perfect pressure-distribution, that no drift may steal our speed. Through geometry and faith, we restore your rolling grace.
